page_title: Paid family and sick leave — Mississippi

statutory_facts_provisional.note: Based on 2023 Mississippi State Personnel Board pilot programme references. Verify if extended, made permanent, or modified.

statutory_facts_provisional.value: No pay mandate for private employers
statutory_facts_provisional.note: Mississippi Code Ann. § 13-5-23 prohibits retaliation but does not mandate pay continuation. Confirm current version of statute.

linter_summary: 12/12 checks passed: forbidden words clean, em dashes clean, hero image present, CSS 2-level path, G2 3-level path, canonical CTAs, customer-strip inside container, tagline-close inside container, $599 pricing, crossover signal, FAQPage schema, state employee pilot referenced.

high_concern_flags.detail: Mississippi Paid Parental Leave Pilot (2023, 6 weeks for state employees) drawn from public coverage. Should be verified against current Mississippi State Personnel Board policy before publish.

California and New York PFML sibling contrast links are in the links-rail. Both states' pages ship in a later batch. Plain-text rendering should be applied if those pages are not live at publish time.
United States _shared/child-base.css carries known margin-clobber patterns from the UK CSS pass. Not introduced by this page. Will fix in the shared CSS retrofit pass.
